name: abu-context-engineering
description: Codex-native context engineering workflows for research, domain wiki maintenance, quality profiling, specs, design briefs, prototype discovery, plans, verification, handoffs, and AGENTS.md authoring.

interface.shortDescription: Research-first Codex workflows for building projects.
interface.longDescription: Abu Context Engineering adds reusable Codex skills for repo-local .thoughts context, reality research, project quality profiling, source-backed domain wiki maintenance, specs, stories, designer briefs, prototype discovery, research-backed plans, verification audits, handoff compaction, and concise AGENTS.md authoring.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Abu Context Engineering to research my project, define the quality profile, and keep the repo-local .thoughts wiki updated.
